source: Advances in building techniques will allow for the construction of sturdier and more durable Strike Cruisers.

source: The latest generation of Strike Cruiser hulls have optimized structural integrity fields and improved bulkheads.

source: Establishing new standards for the modeling and construction of Battlecruisers greatly improves the efficiency of the production pipeline.
